creator: freebsd@nevar.pl
text:
Created attachment 175971
xfce4 terminal incorrect style

Today I have updated xfce4-terminal from version 0.6.3 to 0.8.0
And there is an issue with my theme on the new version. The menu, tabs and scroll bar seems to ignore my global xfce4 theme settings and are still grey. My current xfce4 appearance style is Xfce-dusk and it was working on previous version. To show it I am attaching screenshots.
